label: final-synthesis
text:
{
  "title": "Spec Room",
  "summary": "A role-driven room that drafts, critiques, and finalizes a first-pass spec from a rough objective.",
  "problem": "Teams need a reliable way to turn rough ideas into concrete specs before implementation starts, without pretending every unknown has already been solved.",
  "goals": [
    "Produce a useful first-pass spec from a rough objective.",
    "Capture ambiguity, risks, and open questions in the artifact itself.",
    "Hand off a realistic v1 plan that can move directly into implementation."
  ],
  "nonGoals": [
    "Replace later human review or decision-making.",
    "Solve every future text-room abstraction in v1."
  ],
  "assumptions": [
    "The owner can provide a seed objective and some constraints.",
    "The room is optimized for first-pass clarity, not exhaustive certainty."
  ],
  "proposal": [
    "Use planner, critic, and implementer roles to generate complementary draft inputs.",
    "Synthesize a structured draft spec, then run a critique pass against that draft.",
    "Finalize the artifact as markdown with goals, approach, acceptance criteria, risks, open questions, and an ordered implementation plan."
  ],
  "acceptanceCriteria": [
    "The final artifact can be reviewed asynchronously without re-explaining the objective.",
    "The room lists explicit non-goals, risks, and open questions.",
    "The implementation plan is ordered and realistic for a first shippable version.",
    "The room stops cleanly after the final synthesis pass."
  ],
  "implementationPlan": [
    "Ship the classic Spec Room plugin with draft and critique passes.",
    "Verify it with native tests and a replayable dev-harness scenario.",
    "Try it on real objectives and only then decide whether shared text-room core helpers should be extracted."
  ],
  "risks": [
    "The room may need more configuration once it is used across multiple repos and audiences.",
    "A shared core could be extracted too early if only one room uses the pattern."
  ],
  "openQuestions": [
    "Should future versions write the final spec to a file automatically?",
    "What is the smallest shared abstraction that would help the second text-heavy room without overfitting?"
  ]
}
